articles.excerpt: For a humanoid robot to be deployed in the real world, the choice of command space (i.e., the interface between task planning and whole-body control) is crucial. Existing whole-body controllers typically demand dense kinematic or spatial references that planners struggle to synthesize from task semantics. We instead propose a compact, explicit interface that is intuitive, general, modular, and exp
articles.summary: 针对人形机器人部署中命令空间选择问题，提出HANDOFF框架，通过蒸馏互补教师实现任务空间全身控制。采用紧凑显式接口替代传统密集运动参考，使规划器能从任务语义直接合成控制指令，具备直观、通用、模块化特性。

articles.title: TempoVLA: Learning Speed-Controllable Vision-Language-Action Policies
articles.excerpt: Robot manipulation alternates between low-risk transit phases that call for fast execution and high-risk contact stages that demand slow, precise motion. Yet existing Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) only inherit a single fixed speed from training demonstrations. Prior efforts to accelerate VLAs through model compression, KV-cache reuse, or reinforcement learning only shift the policy from one
articles.summary: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA）仅继承训练演示的固定速度，无法适应操作中快速与精确运动交替需求。提出TempoVLA，通过速度控制机制使模型根据任务阶段动态调整执行速度，提升高风险接触阶段的安全性与低风险阶段的效率。

articles.title: Benchmark Everything Everywhere All at Once
articles.excerpt: Benchmarks are fundamental for evaluating and advancing LLMs and MLLMs by providing standardized and explicit measures of performance. However, their construction is labor-intensive and hard to reuse, raising concerns about sustainability and scalability. Moreover, existing benchmarks often quickly reach performance saturation after their release, resulting in insufficient discrimination among sta
articles.summary: 当前LLM/MLLM基准构建劳动密集、难以复用且易性能饱和。该工作提出一种可持续可扩展的基准框架，通过标准化和显式度量设计，降低构建成本并提升评估区分度，避免过快的性能天花板。

articles.title: Reinforcement Learning Elicits Contextual Learning of Unseen Language Translation
articles.excerpt: Prior work has shown that large language models (LLMs) can translate unseen or low-resource languages by undergoing continued training or even by encoding a grammar book in their context. However, both methods typically overfit specific languages, with limited zero-shot transfer at test time. To translate extremely low-resource languages at scale, we argue that LLMs must acquire the meta-skill of
articles.summary: 为让LLM高效翻译极低资源语言，提出强化学习方法训练模型获取元技能——从上下文（如语法书）中即时学习翻译，避免过拟合特定语言。实验表明该方法在未见语言翻译上实现更强的零样本迁移能力。

articles.title: Unsupervised Skill Discovery for Agentic Data Analysis
articles.excerpt: Inference-time skill augmentation provides a lightweight way to improve data-analytic agents by injecting reusable procedural knowledge without updating model parameters. However, discovering effective skills for data analysis remains challenging, as reliable supervision is expensive and success criteria vary across analytical formats. This raises the key question of how to discover reusable data-
articles.summary: 数据分析代理依赖昂贵监督获取技能，提出无监督技能发现方法，在不更新模型参数下注入可复用过程知识。方法自动从分析格式中发掘隐含技能，提升推理时性能，克服不同分析任务评价标准不一致的困难。

articles.title: EDIT: Evidence-Diagnosed Intervention Training for Rule-Faithful LLM Grading
articles.excerpt: Reliable rubric grading requires more than accurate score prediction. Each judgement must be grounded in the mark scheme and evidence from the student answer. Existing credit-assignment and intervention methods, primarily designed for self-contained reasoning tasks such as mathematics reasoning, struggle in this setting because they do not identify where grading reasoning goes wrong or how the mod
articles.summary: 可靠评分需判词基于评分方案和学生答案证据。提出EDIT框架，通过诊断评分推理错误并施加证据驱动的干预训练，使模型生成规则一致的评分，优于现有针对数学推理的信用分配方法。

articles.title: World-Language-Action Model for Unified World Modeling, Language Reasoning, and Action Synthesis
articles.excerpt: We propose world-language-action (WLA) models as a new class of embodied foundation models. WLA takes textual instructions, images, and robot states as inputs to jointly predict textual subtasks, subgoal images, and robot actions, conjoining the world modeling interface to learn from extensive egocentric videos as in the world-action model (WAM) and the language reasoning capacities to solve compl
articles.summary: 提出WLA模型作为新型具身基础模型，融合世界建模与语言推理能力。以文本指令、图像和机器人状态为输入，联合预测子任务、子目标图像与动作，通过学习海量第一人称视频实现复杂任务求解与动作合成。

articles.title: Agentic Molecular Recovery via Molecule-Aware Exploration
articles.excerpt: Text-guided molecular generation with LLMs often yields invalid SMILES. We argue that invalid drafts should be addressed through a shift from validity-oriented repair to identity-preserving molecular recovery: the objective is not only to restore chemical validity, but also to preserve target-relevant structural cues and recover the molecular identity implied by the description. This perspective r
articles.summary: LLM文本引导分子生成常产生无效SMILES。该工作将问题从有效性修复转向身份保持的分子恢复：不仅还原化学有效性，还保留目标相关结构线索与分子身份。提出分子感知探索方法，实现更精准的序列修复。

articles.title: When Tools Fail: Benchmarking Dynamic Replanning and Anomaly Recovery in LLM Agents
articles.excerpt: Existing benchmarks evaluate Tool-Integrated Reasoning (TIR) in LLMs on idealized ''happy paths'', largely overlooking real-world tool failures. We introduce ToolMaze, a benchmark for dynamic path discovery and error recovery in TIR agents. To separate systematic replanning from blind trial-and-error, ToolMaze adopts a two-dimensional design: DAG-based topological complexity and a 2 times 2 taxono
articles.summary: 现有工具集成推理基准忽略真实工具失败场景。引入ToolMaze基准，采用DAG拓扑复杂度与错误类型二维设计，系统评估LLM代理在工具异常下的动态路径发现与错误恢复能力，区分系统重新规划与盲目试错。

articles.title: Discrete-WAM: Unified Discrete Vision-Action Token Editing for World-Policy Learning
articles.excerpt: Autonomous driving requires reasoning about how ego actions shape the evolution of the surrounding world. However, most end-to-end methods rely on direct state-to-action mappings, capturing correlations without explicitly modeling action-conditioned dynamics. Conversely, continuous-latent world models often lack compositional structure for causal reasoning across counterfactual futures. We introdu
articles.summary: 端到端自动驾驶缺乏动作条件动力学建模。提出Discrete-WAM，将连续世界模型转化为离散视觉-动作令牌空间，通过编辑动作令牌实现反事实推理与因果世界建模，联合学习世界动态与策略，提升规划鲁棒性。

articles.title: Community-Aware Assessment of Social Textual Engagement and Resonance: A Human-Centric Perspective on User-Generated Content Evaluation
articles.excerpt: Traditional Video Quality Assessment (VQA) focuses narrowly on aesthetic fidelity, overlooking the complex social dynamics that define quality in User-Generated Content (UGC). In this work, we propose a paradigm shift from signal-centric metrics to human-centric resonance assessment. We introduce CASTER (Community-Aware Assessment of Social Textual Engagement and Resonance), a new task that evalua
articles.summary: 传统视频质量评估忽视用户生成内容的社会动态。提出CASTER任务，从社区共鸣角度评估内容质量，结合文本参与度分析，实现人类中心视角的评估范式，更贴合真实社交场景中的质量判断。
